title: Headless render operation and adapter slimming
stop_conditions: adapter must rebuild core render flow
side_effect_policy: Modify only scoped files for the current task; never remove unrelated user changes.
evidence: M07A-020, M07A-030, and M07A-040 are done with validation recorded in EVIDENCE_AND_GATES.md.

title: Diagram facts and admission inventory
stop_conditions: unsupported family would be silently admitted
side_effect_policy: Do not move or delete fixtures without explicit evidence and task scope.
evidence: M07A-050 and M07A-060 are done. Detector/parser/render/metadata facts project from core family facts; compare-all/check-alignment consume xtask admission inventory without moving fixtures or silently admitting unsupported families.

title: SVG root viewport and theme deepening
gates: parity-root compare when root behavior changes
side_effect_policy: Keep normalization narrow and document accepted residuals.
evidence: M07A-070 and M07A-080 are done. treeView is the shared root viewport proof family; PresentationTheme covers XyChart and QuadrantChart visible role bundles.

title: Typed semantic ownership and JSON fallback fencing
stop_conditions: public JSON output contract would change without ADR
FlowDB ordering trace would be lost
side_effect_policy: Preserve compatibility JSON output unless an ADR explicitly changes it.
evidence: M07A-090 is done. Engine no longer owns per-family typed common DB sanitization field knowledge; next C4 checkpoint is Flowchart JSON/typed projection convergence.
